steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student's notes describe two distinct lever types with different structural positions. The question asks for a sentence that emphasizes how they contrast — so the correct answer must state the specific positional difference for each type.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'shared properties': focuses on what both lever types have in common rather than how they differ. ✗
  • Choice B — 'vague difference': mentions a difference but does not specify the actual positions of the fulcrum or load. ✗
  • Choice C — 'emphasizes similarity': frames the two types as alike rather than contrasting them. ✗
  • Choice D — 'fulcrum-between vs. load-between': directly states that first-class levers place the fulcrum between effort and load, while second-class levers place the load between effort and fulcrum — the exact positional contrast the notes show. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
